purpose: Feature article header about open-source maintainers
scene: A modest home studio at dusk with a laptop, handwritten architecture notes, a soldering kit, and a window showing soft city rain
subject: An independent software maintainer in their early thirties wearing a worn overshirt, reviewing a pull request while holding a mug
action: Looking at the laptop rather than the camera, one hand on the trackpad, relaxed and absorbed in the work
composition: Waist-up environmental portrait, subject on the right third, working desk visible on the left, natural foreground depth
camera: Photorealistic candid photograph, eye-level 50mm look, shallow but believable depth of field, subtle film grain
style: Honest documentary photography with natural skin, fabric wear, fingerprints, cable clutter, and ordinary imperfections
lighting: Soft monitor glow balanced with warm desk light and cool rainy window light, natural contrast
constraints: no glamorized retouching, plastic skin, staged pose, neon cyberpunk lighting, watermark, or extra people
